title: Fish and Chips
content:
I have found over the years that people really cannot agree on what constitutes good fish and chips. Everyone has different tastes — I prefer a crispier batter and don’t like a pool of grease. So don’t waste your time listening to other fukwits, find your own way.

We tried Audreys in Bridlington under duress from the mother-in-law. She had said a few times she had been without us and it was fantastic.

My wife agreed they were absolutely fucking shit...

title: Playing Golf While Legs Are Fucked
content: It’s been somewhat of a mental struggle at times...
